positive: Minimalist abstract celestial whale breaching through a bioluminescent cosmic wave, stylized linocut woodcut print. The whale has an elegant, curved silhouette, embodying freedom. The water and sky transition seamlessly, using deep indigo, sapphire blue, and brilliant electric turquoise. High contrast is key, emphasizing the solid black silhouette of the whale against the glowing background. Geometric patterns incorporating constellations and nebulae fill the negative space. Clean lines, symmetrical composition, perfect for repeating tile pattern, vector quality, high saturation, smooth gradients, sticker art style.
negative: blurry, grainy, artifacts, watermark, text, logos, low resolution, deformed, extra limbs, ugly, bad anatomy, noise, messy, poor composition, jpeg artifacts
